text: Here, I feel a quiet anticipation. The spacious, softly lit room with scattered bags suggests preparation—a transitional moment before activity erupts. Moving into the next space with bright colors, bold text, and digital displays, my curiosity awakens. This exhibit, dedicated to research and development, stirs a sense of wonder at human ingenuity and progress. I am eager to learn, observe, and contemplate the interplay between creativity, knowledge, and technology.
